creator: bsd@volki.at
text:
Created attachment 149568
alternative patch

There may be some issues with the original patch:
1) The port name is changed to upper case initial. I think that this is quite non-standard, and it is inconsistent with previous versions of the port.
2) Autonatic retrieval of the distfile did not work for me. Apart from "usual" errors like "file not found", some servers strangely delivered an HTML file instead of the zip file, triggering a checksum mismatch.
3) Removing the loop that looks for the latest tclsh script will certainly break compatibility with tcl 8.4 and 8.5, which are still contained in the "USES" line in the Makefile.
4) Package registration does not work, See below.

My alternative patch hopefully solves issues #1-3, but #4 remains. The port seems to install fine, but package registration fails with the following output. I have no idea why, since I don't know what the new pkg tool is doing here.

===>  Installing for scid-4.5.2
===>  Checking if scid already installed
